name: nah-mean
description: Portable light-align and context-fit execution dispatch skill for ambiguous high-expectation agent requests.

install.codex: gh skill install handlecusion/nah-mean nah-mean --agent codex --scope user
install.codex_pinned: gh skill install handlecusion/nah-mean nah-mean@v0.3.2 --agent codex --scope user
install.claude_code: gh skill install handlecusion/nah-mean nah-mean --agent claude-code --scope user
install.skills_cli: npx skills add handlecusion/nah-mean --skill nah-mean -a codex -g -y
install.generic: Copy one prompt from prompts/ into the agent system/developer instructions.

verified_install_commands.command: gh skill install handlecusion/nah-mean nah-mean --agent codex --scope user
verified_install_commands.result: installs skill for Codex user scope

verified_install_commands.command: npx --yes skills add handlecusion/nah-mean --skill nah-mean -a codex -g -y --copy
